name: Gunsaw (Reloaded Demo)
description:
Reloaded Update Demo

My personal update on this gunsaw bot that is from @UnbalancedDragonfruit49

May not work as accurately or as intended, this is currently a test to see how I could improve on this. Expect this bot to be abandoned once the update is done and moved over to the main bot, but I will keep it up just incase yall got good chats you don't wanna lose. So go ahead and mess with the gunsawians here.

Update patchnotes: Added tags and this song reminded me on some place called Eden... new initial message eventually be here which I will try to include majority of the gunsawian doing their own thing. (Procrastination jumpscare)

Please read: I used headcanons and speculation on few things in this bot, if the bot is acting weird or talking for you then it is entirely on JLLM fault, plus the new JLLM is unpredictable for me during use.
creator: Apionne
